seo.title: Your destination for sticker trading
seo.desc: With the 2026 World Cup just around the corner, it's time to complete your collection. Whether it's Panini, Adrenalyn XL or Topps sticker collections, LaLiga or the 2026 World Cup... CambioCromos is the perfect place to trade World Cup football stickers and any other sports collection. Manage your albums, find the stickers you are missing and connect with collectors from all over Spain — all in a single free platform.

createListing.subtitleGroup: Review and complete your pack details
createListing.subtitleIndividual: Share your sticker with the community
createListing.packWarning: ℹ️ You are creating a listing for multiple stickers. Describe all stickers in the description.
createListing.imageRequired: An image is required to publish a listing
createListing.collectionOptional: Optional: name of the collection or album
createListing.linkOptional: Optional: linking to a specific sticker improves visibility in other users' albums
createListing.descPlaceholderGroup: Describe all stickers included in the pack, their condition, etc.
createListing.descPlaceholderIndividual: Describe the sticker, its condition, special features, etc.
createListing.descHelperGroup: List all included stickers with their details
createListing.descHelperIndividual: Include number, collection, rarity, and any relevant details
createListing.termsPrefix: I have read and agree to the
createListing.termsBody: Remember that the images, descriptions, or names you upload must be yours or you must have the necessary rights to use them. Cambiocromos.com does not publish content for you, it only offers you the space to share it with other collectors. The user is solely responsible for the content they publish. If you upload images that infringe copyright, trademarks, or any legal rules, we may remove them and suspend your account. Cambiocromos.com does not own the stickers nor acts as an intermediary in sales or exchanges; it only connects users. By continuing, you declare that you have the right to publish the content and accept our Content Policy.

cookiesBanner.title: Cookie Control
cookiesBanner.description: We use cookies to analyze traffic and improve your experience. By accepting, you help us optimize the platform. Check our <policy>Cookie Policy</policy> for more details.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Cambiocromos.com, we take your privacy very seriously. This policy describes how we collect, use, and protect your personal information, in compliance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR) and LOPDGDD.
privacy.section1Desc: The data controller is the Cambiocromos.com administration team. For any privacy-related issues, you can contact our Data Protection Officer at:
privacy.section2Li2: Location Data: Postal code (to facilitate nearby trades), country, and province.
privacy.section2Li3: Usage Data: Information about your collections, missing/duplicate lists, interactions, and chats.
privacy.section2Li4: Technical Data: IP address, device type, and browser (for security and analytics purposes).
privacy.section3Li1: Manage your user account and allow access to the platform.
privacy.section3Li2: Facilitate the matching system to find other nearby collectors.
privacy.section3Li3: Allow communication between users through the internal chat.
privacy.section3Li4: Send important notifications about the service (you can disable them).
privacy.section3Li5: Ensure the security of the platform and prevent fraud.
privacy.section4Desc: The legal basis for processing your data is the performance of the contract (Terms of Service) you agree to when registering, as well as your explicit consent for certain features (such as approximate location).
privacy.section5Intro: We do not sell your data to third parties. We share information only with service providers strictly necessary for the operation of the app:
privacy.section5Li2: Google Analytics: For anonymous web traffic analysis.
privacy.section6Intro: We will keep your data as long as your account remains active. If you decide to delete your account:
privacy.section6Li1: Your direct personal data (email, profile) will be deleted or anonymized immediately or after a 30-day grace period to prevent accidental deletions.
privacy.section6Li2: Database backups are automatically deleted according to our retention cycle (maximum 90 days).
privacy.section7Intro: As a user, you have the right to:
privacy.section7Li1: Access your data and know what information we hold.
privacy.section7Li2: Rectify incorrect or incomplete data from your profile.
privacy.section7Li3: Erase your data ("Right to be forgotten") through the "Delete Account" option in Settings.
privacy.section7Li4: Restrict the processing of your data in certain circumstances.
privacy.section7Li5: Portability: Request a copy of your data in a structured format.
privacy.section7Outro: You can exercise these rights by writing to

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.intro: Cambiocromos.com uses cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, ensure site security, and analyze how our platform is used.
cookies.section1Desc: Cookies are small text files that websites save on your computer or mobile device when you visit them. They allow the site to remember your actions and preferences (such as login) over a period of time.
cookies.section2Sub1Intro: They are strictly necessary for the operation of the website. They allow us to:
cookies.section2Sub1Li1: Keep your session securely logged in (Authentication with Supabase).
cookies.section2Sub1Li3: Protect the web against automated attacks.
cookies.section2Sub2Intro: We use Google Analytics to collect anonymous information about how visitors use our site. This helps us improve performance and usability.
cookies.section2Sub2Li1: These cookies do not collect information that personally identifies you.
cookies.section2Sub2Li2: All information is aggregated and therefore anonymous.
cookies.section3Desc: You can control and/or delete cookies as you wish. You can delete all cookies that are already on your computer and you can set most browsers to prevent them from being placed. However, if you do this, you may have to manually adjust some preferences every time you visit a site and some services and functionalities (such as logging in) may not work.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Desc: Welcome to Cambiocromos.com. By accessing, registering or using our platform, you ("User") agree to be legally bound by these Terms of Service ("Terms"). If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you must not use our services.
terms.alertDesc: Due to the social nature of the platform (interaction with strangers, private chats, and transactions), Cambiocromos.com is reserved exclusively for people over 18 years of age. By registering, you represent and warrant that you are at least 18 years of age. Accounts found to belong to minors will be suspended immediately and without notice.
terms.section2Desc: To use certain features, you must register and create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your password and all activities that occur under your account. We reserve the right to suspend or delete accounts that violate these terms, provide false information, or remain inactive for extended periods.
terms.section3Intro: Our platform allows users to publish images (stickers), create collections, and send messages. Regarding this content:
terms.section3Li1: Ownership: You retain intellectual property rights to the content you create and upload. However, by publishing it, you grant Cambiocromos.com a worldwide, non-exclusive, and free license to use, display, and distribute such content in connection with the service.
terms.section3Li2: User Responsibility: You are solely responsible for all content you publish. You declare that you have all necessary rights or authorizations to publish such content and that it does not infringe third-party rights.
terms.section3Li3: Moderation: Cambiocromos.com has no obligation to preview content, but has the absolute right and at its sole discretion to review, reject or delete any content it deems inappropriate, illegal or violating these Terms, without notice.
terms.section31Intro: It is strictly forbidden to publish:
terms.section31Li1: Illegal, defamatory, obscene, pornographic, indecent, or threatening content.
terms.section31Li2: Hate speech, harassment, or discrimination against other users.
terms.section31Li3: Material that infringes copyrights, trademarks, or third-party intellectual property.
terms.section31Li4: Spam, unauthorized advertising, or links to malicious sites.
terms.section4Intro: Cambiocromos.com facilitates contact between users. You acknowledge that:
terms.section4Li1: You are interacting with people who may be strangers to you.
terms.section4Li2: You are responsible for exercising caution in all interactions, especially when sharing information or arranging shipments.
terms.section4Li3: Zero Tolerance: We do not tolerate harassment, insults, or abusive behavior. We have tools to Report and Block users. Any verified report of abuse will result in immediate suspension of the offending account.
terms.section5Desc: Cambiocromos.com acts solely as a technological intermediary. We are not a party to any exchange or sale transaction between users. We do not guarantee the veracity of the listings, the quality of the stickers, or the fulfillment of agreements between users. You release Cambiocromos.com from any claim, demand, or damage related to disputes with other users.
terms.section6Desc: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Modifications will take effect immediately upon publication. Continued use of the service implies acceptance of the new terms.
terms.section7Desc: To report violations or legal inquiries, contact us at:
